title: Microchip
description: Microchip is a quality-of-life mod that allows the player to track their mobs across the world!
body:
![Microchip interface](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/28668883/223999524-f7a4b856-bdb3-46d1-94f3-2ddc9bde0a29.png)

**Microchip** is a quality-of-life mod that allows the player to track their mobs across the world!

- Keep track of your mob's health and status by tagging them with a Microchip
- View their status while in the vicinity of your mob
- Organise your mobs into different groups and categories
- Creative controls to carry out commands on your mobs (available only in Creative mode)
